description: If a responder cannot accept the proposed codec it SHOULD counter-propose; the initiator MUST accept or the responder MUST send ERROR after the second proposal
notes: The runner proposes 'flatbuffers', which many implementations will counter-propose. If the implementation accepts flatbuffers, the test passes immediately. If it counter-proposes, the runner accepts the revised parameters and verifies a session is established.

steps.comment: Propose an uncommon codec; the implementation may counter-propose 'json' or another supported codec.
Confirm the session is ACTIVE regardless of which codec was ultimately negotiated.
